_comment: Recorded issuesReferencedByPr responses keyed by PR number. Shapes match Issue[] (src/core/types.ts).

42.title: Prevent double charges due to missing idempotency key
42.body:
When the charge endpoint is called multiple times with the same request (e.g. due to a network retry), we risk charging the customer twice. We need an idempotency key to de-duplicate requests.

Acceptance criteria:
- `charge()` must require an idempotency key
- duplicate calls with the same key must be no-ops

55.title: Zero-amount charges succeed silently
55.body:
A bug was filed where a zero-amount charge passes through to the payment provider and creates a $0 transaction. The fix should guard against non-positive amounts at the function boundary.

Reproduced in staging with `charge(0)`.
